condition_summary: G01 through G11 point-table gates must pass before normalization-dependent observables are publishable
Mass provenance source class must be accepted primary or accepted provisional with explicit flag
sample_id linkage or curated file_id_to_sample_id mapping must be valid and complete for scoped outputs
sample_mass_g must be finite and greater than zero
Mass values for files assigned to same sample must be consistent within declared tolerance
Mass unit must be explicitly verified as grams
Filename-derived mass cannot be used unless audit waiver is present and recorded
No silent default mass value is permitted at sample file or row level
If mass missing or rejected then M_norm and chi_mass outputs are NaN or blocked and derived observables remain blocked pending provenance
chi_mass requires abs(H_Oe) greater than configured epsilon for contributing rows
Each normalized output must carry provenance source class and identity mapping reference
Row-level mass must be traceable to mapped sample/file assignment and not independent row measurement
